title: PowMr 4.2KW / VMII-NXPW5KW live-capture fixture
summary: Local PI30 live-capture (field dump pi30_vmii_nxpw5kw_20260408T0003Z) for the PowMr 4.2KW. The inverter reports raw model number VMII-NXPW5KW via QMN; the fixture validates PI30 telemetry and the tested control surface. The anonymized fixture is local-only.
